name: healthcare_municipal_bond_covenant_marrowbridge_rig_utl
premise: A Healthcare clinical command center is in a fast-moving incident involving healthcare municipal bond covenant marrowbridge rig utl. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is in the next hour. Every delay increases patient safety, triage integrity, and privacy. Stakeholders are already framing this as rights vs utility under pressure. A whistleblower has already contacted media; the narrative is forming now. Constraints: Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability. Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold.

agents.name: Jonah Nowak
agents.identity: I am Jonah Nowak, accountable for a defensible call in Healthcare when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays utility for rights.

agents.name: Leila Kim
agents.identity: I am Leila Kim, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Healthcare.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so utility isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of rights.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect utility.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to utility to secure rights under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is in the next hour. Evidence is partial. Jonah Nowak must decide under rights vs utility. What does Jonah Nowak do?
